summary: /goal was ambiguous: user expected a skill but no local skill or command existed
evidence: rg found no /goal command or skill reference
impact: Broad objectives lacked a formal entry point before routing

summary: Agent contract validation failed before the change
evidence: validate-agent-contracts reported missing frontino command and alias command missing RAG/handoff mentions
impact: Agent registry and command files were not coherent

summary: Patch failed because expected text did not match encoded command files
evidence: apply_patch verification failed on command markdown
impact: Large combined patch was brittle against encoding differences

summary: Token economy writer rejected an entry because privacy text matched blocked terms
evidence: write-token-economy validation failed on blocked wording
impact: Economy record could not be saved until wording was sanitized

summary: Working tree already had unrelated frontend, docs, and tablet changes
evidence: git status showed modified files outside the current agent-memory scope
impact: Risk of overwriting or mixing unrelated work

summary: No central public base existed for recurring failures and reusable fixes
evidence: User requested consolidated databases for problems and solutions
impact: Operational learning was split across logs and handoffs

summary: start-topic still reported the old orchestrator token budget after Maestro became learning router
evidence: validate-area agents output showed orquestrador budget under the old target
impact: Local tooling could contradict the updated routing docs

summary: ESLint validate-area frontend failed due to synchronous setState in useEffect and unused ShieldAlert import
evidence: npm run lint reported 2 errors (Avoid calling setState() directly within an effect) and 1 warning (unused ShieldAlert)
impact: TypeScript build completed successfully but ESLint blocked compilation in frontend validation area check

summary: Maestro could record lessons but had no explicit confidence level for solo decisions
evidence: User asked whether Maestro learns alone and how to let it make some decisions independently
impact: Without confidence gates, autonomy could be interpreted too broadly

summary: Maestro had no concrete training/eval suite for routing quality
evidence: User approved building the learning/eval system starting with Maestro
impact: Confidence promotion lacked repeatable cases and C3 readiness criteria

summary: Missing-data route started with analista instead of Frontino
evidence: plan-route returned analista -> dados -> pipeline for dados faltantes, while Maestro contract says Frontino score first
impact: Coverage workflows could skip the official LAI score and roadmap

summary: Scope gate rejected literal package-manager commands inside plan-route regex
evidence: check-scope-gates flagged risky automation command literals in tools/agents/plan-route.py
impact: Local automations could normalize unsafe command text and fail scope validation

summary: Maestro could not perceive Antigravity/Gemini changes without an active watcher
evidence: User expected Maestro to notice external file changes without being explicitly asked
impact: LLM sessions are reactive unless a local process feeds them state

summary: Maestro Watch state was local-only and invisible on the tablet monitor
evidence: The watcher wrote .local JSON, while the tablet web monitor reads files from C:\Omega\tmp
impact: User could not see near-real-time routing alerts on the tablet without asking the agent

summary: No mandatory model-level signature log existed for changes across AI tools
evidence: User required every project, ONG, editor, agent, and model change to show who did what
impact: Concurrent AI work could become hard to audit before commit or handoff
related_path: memory/provenance; AI_MASTER_PROMPT.md; CODEX.md; CLAUDE.md; ORQUESTRADOR.md; AGENTS.md

summary: Strict publication validation blocks deploy because public CSV files are missing manifest pattern coverage
evidence: validate-area publication reported 8 SEM PADRAO NO MANIFESTO entries under data/public/sorocaba
impact: Deploy should wait until manifest/publication consistency is fixed or explicitly accepted as a known release risk

summary: Browser remote debugging exposed unrelated personal tabs while checking Antigravity/Gemini activity
evidence: Remote debug page list included pages outside the project test surface
impact: Agents should avoid inspecting browser page contents unless the target is explicitly project-scoped

summary: Antigravity sandbox dev server reports a React hydration mismatch for the html data-theme attribute
evidence: Next dev log shows server HTML missing client data-theme=carbon while layout script and theme switcher both mutate documentElement
impact: The visual preview can be misleading and should be fixed before treating the sandbox UI as clean

summary: PowerShell Start-Process rejected using the same file for stdout and stderr redirection
evidence: Attempt to start the official frontend dev server with a single combined log failed
impact: Local preview startup needed a retry with separate output and error logs
